one-card.name: One Card Draw
one-card.description: Daily guidance or a quick answer

positions.name: Past
positions.description: What has led to this moment

positions.name: The Querent
positions.description: You and your situation until now

positions.name: Surroundings
positions.description: Your current surroundings and present location

positions.name: External Events
positions.description: Current events related to your question

positions.name: The Present
positions.description: Your current situation and the heart of the matter

positions.name: The Challenge
positions.description: What crosses you, the obstacle or influence

positions.name: The Foundation
positions.description: The root cause and subconscious influences

positions.name: Recent Past
positions.description: What is leaving, events that shaped this moment

positions.name: The Crown
positions.description: What you aspire to, the best possible outcome

positions.name: Near Future
positions.description: What is approaching, the next development

positions.name: The Querent
positions.description: How you see yourself in this situation

positions.name: External Forces
positions.description: How others see you and outside influences

positions.name: The Outcome
positions.description: The final resolution if this path continues

yearly.name: Yearly Spread
yearly.description: 12-card year-ahead reading, one card per month

positions.name: January
positions.description: The energy and themes that open your year

positions.name: March
positions.description: Energies arriving as winter turns to spring

positions.name: May
positions.description: The opportunities and challenges of May

positions.name: July
positions.description: What July reveals at the heart of summer

positions.name: August
positions.description: The energy of late summer and harvest

positions.name: September
positions.description: Themes arriving as the year begins to close

positions.name: October
positions.description: What October stirs up for you

positions.name: November
positions.description: Energies drawing the year toward its end

positions.name: December
positions.description: How the year closes and what carries forward

positions.name: Emotional Past
positions.description: Past emotional states that shaped your personality

positions.name: Emotional Present
positions.description: Your current emotional state and personality

positions.name: Emotional Future
positions.description: Where your emotional self is heading

positions.name: Relationships Present
positions.description: The current state of your relationships

positions.name: Hopes & Career Past
positions.description: Past hopes, fears, and career influences

positions.name: Hopes & Career Now
positions.description: Current hopes, fears, and career situation

positions.name: Hopes & Career Future
positions.description: Future direction of your hopes and career

positions.name: Finances Present
positions.description: Current financial state and active projects

positions.name: Spiritual Present
positions.description: Your current spiritual state and practice

positions.name: Obstacles Past
positions.description: Past challenges and how you overcame them

positions.name: Obstacles Present
positions.description: Current obstacles and challenges to face

positions.name: Obstacles Future
positions.description: Challenges that lie ahead on your path

positions.name: Health Past
positions.description: Past health matters and their lingering influence

positions.name: Health & Future
positions.description: What lies in store over the next 4-6 months. If echoing positions 4-6, the health of a relationship is indicated.
